name: EnrollmentField
description: EnrollmentField schema from Public API (Otter Public API).

key.description: The key of field, will be used in the Create User API.

required.description: Whether this field is required when creating a user.

type.description: The type of field, frontend can use type to decide which input to use. i.e. use a date picker for DATE type, use a text input for EMAIL/FULL_NAME type.

label.description: This can be used as the field input's label on the frontend.
